headline: Wall Street Overlooked This Industrial Stock. Down 14%, It's Now a Forever Buy.
summary: Illinois Tool Works doesn't toil in anonymity, but it's also not the apple of Wall Street's eye when it comes to industrial stocks -- and that's all right.
